description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the busybox:latest Docker image. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy, and include a global before_script that echoes "Before script section", "For example you might run an update here or install a build dependency", "Or perhaps you might print out some debugging details", and a global after_script that echoes "After script section" and "For example you might do some cleanup here". Add a build1 job in the build stage that runs echo "Do your build here". Add a test1 job in the test stage that runs echo "Do a test here" then echo "For example run a test suite", and a test2 job in the test stage that runs echo "Do another parallel test here" then echo "For example run a lint test". Add a deploy1 job in the deploy stage that runs echo "Do your deploy here". No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
